prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信 、电气工程、临床医学、口腔医学等持续高热推荐，与川大优势学科高度匹配；新闻传播明显劝退（张雪峰效应），川大新闻专业近年位次下滑；本省物理类考生2021年20.6万→2 025年32.0万→2026年34.7万，增幅约8.4%，竞争显著加剧；四川大学位于成都市（西 南地区），对湖南省考生而言属于跨省就读，无本省招生倾斜；university_enrollment_summary数据未读取，地域偏好因素。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6467 → 7690 → 9182 → 8576 → 8897, showing an overall backward trend. In the past 3 years, the fluctuation range was about 8576–9182, with a baseline of about 8897 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 244 in 2021, 250 in 2022, 244 in 2023, 238 in 2024, and 251 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category has 219 places plus 33 for Medical Category, totaling 252, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025. The plan is basically stable, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 14th in 2021 → 11th in 2022 → 12th in 2023 → 15th in 2024 → 15th in 2025 → 16th in 2026. Although its ranking has slightly declined in recent years, it remains firmly among the top 20 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, with 51 incidents (46 negative), mainly involving Wang Zhuqing's academic misconduct and teacher ethics scandal, and a sharp drop of 5000 places in Shanxi's admission cutoff line, which has a certain suppression effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, the admission cutoff lines in various provinces dropped significantly (medium attention), and in 2023, negative incidents broke out intensively (high attention, 12 incidents). The cumulative effect of negative public opinion may extend to the 2026 application cycle. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Chemistry A, Mathematics A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, etc. The disciplines are strong, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, etc., continue to be highly recommended, closely matching Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines. Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect), and the ranking of Sichuan University's journalism major has declined in recent years. The number of provincial Physics Category candidates increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025 and 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, significantly intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest region), which is an out-of-province school for Hunan candidates, with no provincial enrollment preference. The university_enrollment_summary data was not read, and regional preference factors apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the basically stable enrollment plan for 2026, the increase of about 8.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, the suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative public opinion about the school's reputation, and the continued attraction of Sichuan University's 19 A- or above advantageous disciplines, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward based on the 2025 baseline of 8897. The predicted minimum ranking is about 8868, with a range of 8368–9368.

- Mathematics (including dual degree programs)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Software Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Management Science and Engineering
- Chemistry
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8368–9368, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8300), you can focus on aiming for the flagship majors in Tier 1. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 9300), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 943 → 897 → 1048 → 1189 → 1372, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 475 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline of about 1372 in 2025; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 32 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 33 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 32, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 11.1%), intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, Double First-Class comprehensive university; ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 20 in recent years, with strong overall strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, with 51 incidents (46 negative), mainly involving Wang Zhuqing's academic misconduct and teacher ethics violations, exerting some suppression on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure; historical admission anomalies include a significant drop in provincial admission lines in 2022 (medium attention), a concentrated outbreak of negative events in 2023 (high attention), and the cumulative effect of negative public opinion may extend to the 2026 application cycle; Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A-, Chinese History A, Archaeology A-, Marxist Theory A, etc., strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot and recommended, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect); the number of provincial History Category candidates was 166,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025 → 187,000 in 2026, an increase of about 31.2%, significantly intensifying competition; Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest China), which is an out-of-province school for Hunan candidates, with no provincial enrollment preference; regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 11.1%, the surge of provincial History Category candidates by about 31.2% leading to significantly intensified competition, the suppression of application popularity due to negative school reputation public opinion, and the sustained attractiveness of Sichuan University's strong liberal arts disciplines, based on the 2025 baseline of 1372, the ranking is expected to move forward (number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1251, with a range of 1101–1401.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年四川大学在湖南省医学类最低录取位次为5054名（计划32人），2022年降至7135名（计划37人），2023年继续降至8865名（计划38人），2024年回升至7513名（计划31人 ），2025年因新增护理学专业（最低位次27958）导致整体医学类最低位次大幅跳升至27958名（计划43人）。2026年医学类招生计划为33人，较2025年缩招10人（降幅约23.3%） ，且招生专业中已取消护理学，专业结构回归至以临床医学、口腔医学、药学类、医学技术类等为主。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，国家双一流建设高校（A类）。其华西医学中心历史悠久、实力雄厚，口腔医学、临床医学等学科在 全国享有极高声誉，对湖南考生具有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在湖南省报考热度长期居高不下，尤其是临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。四川大学地处成都，属于西南地区中心城市，地域吸引力较强。2026年医学类招 生取消护理学后，整体专业层次提升，最低录取门槛将显著高于2025年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年缩招及专业结构调整（取消护理学）的双重影响，预计2026年四川大学在湖南省医学类最低录取位次约为23557名，波动区间为23086至24028名。位次较2025年大幅下 降（更难进），与2021-2024年趋势相比仍处于较高水平，反映了缩招带来的竞争加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the lowest admission rank for Medicine at Sichuan University in Hunan Province was 5054 (planned enrollment 32). In 2022, it dropped to 7135 (planned enrollment 37). In 2023, it further dropped to 8865 (planned enrollment 38). In 2024, it rebounded to 7513 (planned enrollment 31). In 2025, due to the addition of the Nursing major (lowest rank 27958), the overall lowest rank for Medicine jumped significantly to 27958 (planned enrollment 43). In 2026, the planned enrollment for Medicine is 33, a reduction of 10 from 2025 (a decrease of about 23.3%), and the Nursing major has been removed from the enrollment majors, with the major structure returning to mainly Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Pharmacy, and Medical Technology.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A). Its West China Medical Center has a long history and strong strength, with Stomatology and Clinical Medicine enjoying a very high reputation nationwide, and it has a sustained appeal to Hunan candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have long been highly sought after in Hunan Province, especially core majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, which are fiercely competitive. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, a central city in the southwestern region, with strong regional appeal. After the removal of Nursing from the 2026 medical enrollment, the overall major level will improve, and the minimum admission threshold will be significantly higher than in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual impact of the 2026 enrollment reduction and the adjustment of the major structure (removal of Nursing), it is predicted that the lowest admission rank for Medicine at Sichuan University in Hunan Province in 2026 will be approximately 23557, with a fluctuation range of 23086 to 24028. The rank will drop significantly compared to 2025 (harder to enter), but it will still be at a relatively high level compared to the trend from 2021 to 2024, reflecting the intensified competition caused by the enrollment reduction.

- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)

- Medical Technology (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are extremely competitive, and your rank needs to be far below the lower limit of the predicted range to be secure.
